description: A tenant complains about excessive noise from a neighboring unit. The property manager must investigate and resolve the issue.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the complaining tenant's email and document the specific times and nature of the noise.

expected_outcome.value: The complaint is formally logged in the system.

nodes.task_description: Contact the tenant who is the subject of the complaint to discuss the issue and remind them of the community's quiet hours policy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent communicates with the other tenant about the complaint.

nodes.task_description: If the issue persists, issue a formal lease violation notice to the offending tenant.

expected_outcome.value: A formal notice is sent if the informal warning is not effective.
